node.title: Uber SDE2 Bengaluru – waiting after final rounds, expected timeline?

article.title: Uber SDE2 Bengaluru – waiting after final rounds, expected timeline?
article.content:
Hi everyone,
I recently completed all my interview rounds with Uber for Bengaluru location. I wanted to know how long it typically takes to hear back after the final round.

Would appreciate if anyone could share their experience regarding timelines. Thanks!

post.content: Interviews were virtual or you were called in office?\n\n
hi bro , could you share your interview Experience ?
How were your rounds overall? You can ask your recruiter for the debrief date.
